tables.description: Subject ID, affection status, family history of cancer, colorectal cancer risk factor of participant, history of prior malignancy of participant, history of screening assays for HIV-1 or HIV-2 antibodies of participant, tobacco smoking history of participant, gynecological surgeries in the past of participant, age, gender, race, ethnicity, albumin, blood loss recorded, BP excursions post anesthesia, carbon dioxide level during organ excision, comments, ECOG functional performance status, FFPE blocks, fresh frozen plasma, general comment, hepatitis B, C, HIV, immunosuppressive issue, infectious diseases, Karnofsky Score, live births, menopausal status, number of pregnancies, oxygen (O2) desaturation prior to organ excision, platelets, packed red blood cells, pathology review, participant temperature recorded, pelvic washing collection, status scale recorded, tissue bank, tissue processing, tissue collection, timing of score, tumor characteristics, urine output recorded, alcohol consumption, exposed to environmental carcinogens, exposed to secondhand smoke, hormonally based birth control, smoking, and treatment of participants with different type of cancer and involved in the "National Cancer Institute (NCI) Biospecimen Pre-analytical Variables (BPV) Analysis" project.
